observations: Empty ChromaDB collections: healing_knowledge, aesthetics, experiential_journal, episteme_research, enterprise_knowledge, critic, unresolved_tensions, aesthetic_patterns, scope_reflections, reflections_researcher, reflections_critic, episteme, researcher, reflections_coder, writer, commander, reflections_writer, experiential, scope_project_renewable_energy, tensions
narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j security error blocking memory access due to unauthorized authentication, impacting our persistent knowledge graph. Five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—lack versioned prompts, creating operational gaps in our agent orchestration. While the system health status remains "healthy" with no failure patterns, these discrepancies risk inconsistent agent behavior over time. My immediate priority is diagnosing the Neo4j credential issue and implementing versioned prompts for the affected agents.
